MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUMSKI, JACK SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAR-20-1996 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE TOMAR MASON, MNORMAN, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. DEFT IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON THE RECORD. PLTF. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONF 3/14/96 DEPT #7

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EDWARDS, RON THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 57 TAYLOR STREET #440, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $4,300.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,300.00, LEASE FORFEITED, EVICTION STAYED SO LONG AS DEFT MAKES INSTALLMENT PMTS; SEE JUDGMNT FOR SCHEDULE. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS & ATNYS FEES DEFT RESTORED TO TENANCY UNDER 1995 LEASE IF ALL PMTS MADE; PLTF WILL SET ASIDE JDMNT & DISM. IF NOT, PLTF APPLY EX-PART TO LIFT STAY ON EVICTION. SEE JUDGMNT FOR FURTH STIPULATIONS
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
